summary.message: Stock prediction dashboard will be generated by the next GitHub Actions run using real market data only.

market_context_source.note: Stock module consumes market context but does not modify baseline_v1 or Alpha v1.

guardrails: No synthetic stock data is used for live stock forecasts.
This is a probabilistic forecast module, not a trading system.
Missing fundamentals, earnings, company news and single-stock options must be labeled missing, not inferred.
The next real-data run will populate scenario ranking, key price levels, stock confluence, stock alerts, historical analogs, simulated paths, and forecast ledger fields.
